title: Soja de Portugal
description:
***.pt ***.com/c/soja-de-portugal/458493209 

491GB leaked from there as a result of this breach. 

What kind of data leaked: 
- SAP data 
- contacts 
- contracts 
- planning 
- logistics 
- projects data 
- personal data 
- employee data 
- partners data 
- customers data 
- financial data 
- correspondence 
- production data 
- quality control data 
- offers and proposals 
- data related to Sorgal, Avicasal, Savinor and other brands 
- other sensitive business data

Instead of negotiations, threats were made and the leaked data was not even reported to anyone

here is the text they wrote https://***.as/***.md
